hero.headline: Cutting Styles, Not Corners
hero.description: Bonifacio Auto Shop is a premier barber and salon in Cavite, dedicated to providing top-notch grooming services. Our experienced team, led by owner Steven Gabriel Madali, is committed to ensuring every client leaves feeling refreshed and revitalized. From classic cuts to modern styles, we've got you covered.

gallery.headline: Featured Styles
gallery.subheadline: Showcasing our latest and greatest work

items.title: The Classic Cut
items.description: A timeless haircut that exudes sophistication and style. Our team of experts will work with you to create a customized look that suits your face shape and personal taste. From consultation to completion, we'll ensure you're completely satisfied with the final result.

testimonial.author: Mark Santos
testimonial.quote: I've been going to Bonifacio Auto Shop for months now, and I've never been disappointed. The classic cut is my go-to style, and Steven always gets it just right. Highly recommended!

items.title: The Ultimate Shave
items.description: Indulge in the luxury of a traditional hot towel shave, complete with soothing scents and expert technique. Our team will guide you through the process, ensuring a comfortable and rejuvenating experience. Leave feeling refreshed, revitalized, and ready to take on the day.

testimonial.author: Renzel Cruz
testimonial.quote: The ultimate shave at Bonifacio Auto Shop is an experience like no other. The attention to detail and care taken by the team is exceptional. I feel like a new man after every visit!

items.title: The Grooming Package
items.description: Treat yourself to the full Bonifacio Auto Shop experience with our comprehensive grooming package. Including a haircut, shave, and other grooming services, this package is perfect for special occasions or simply as a way to pamper yourself. Our team will work with you to create a customized package tailored to your needs and preferences.

testimonial.author: Ryan Reyes
testimonial.quote: I opted for the grooming package at Bonifacio Auto Shop, and it was worth every penny. The team was friendly, professional, and made sure I felt comfortable throughout the entire process. I'll definitely be back for more!

contact.description: For any inquiries or to explore your vision further, we invite you to contact our professional team using the details provided below.
